content: Verified that current main already contains the post-`d058960` body-focus fallback from merged PR 322, so the remaining live failure is beyond that patch. The shipped code now has `shouldHandleShellInput`, `handleTextInput`, and document-level keydown/beforeinput delegation, yet the browser repro still leaves `A1` selected and the formula bar on the placeholder. I used this round to confirm the runtime gap is now narrower than the merged event-bridge fixes, but I did not ship another PR yet because I have not isolated a smaller correct delta beyond 322.
Holding as requested. `run/apple/Grace` is clean and I’m staying parked until the blocker is no longer behavioral and you want a concrete polish-only follow-up.
